# Assessment Overview

The following supplementary assessment documents were generated for this report:

- [architecture-diagram.md](architecture-diagram.md) — Architecture diagram covering system layers and core component relationships.
- [dependency-map.md](dependency-map.md) — Dependency inventory grouped by functional category and test scope.
- [api-service-contracts.md](api-service-contracts.md) — HTTP endpoint inventory and service communication patterns.
- [data-architecture.md](data-architecture.md) — Database configuration, entity model, and repository behavior.
- [configuration-inventory.md](configuration-inventory.md) — Configuration sources, profiles, secrets handling, and runtime settings.
- [business-workflows.md](business-workflows.md) — Primary user workflows and business rules for photo management.
